name: Lentils Monastery Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onions and carrots; sauté for 3-5 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in thyme and marjoram; cook for an additional minute.
4. Add remaining ingredients to the pot; stir well.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
6. Simmer on low heat for 45 minutes or until lentils are tender.
7. To serve, place half a teaspoon of vinegar in a serving bowl.
8. Ladle the lentil mixture into the bowl and top with grated Parmesan (or your favorite cheese).
